seo.title: About Us
seo.description: Sample about page for a community organization.

blocks.title: A simple example for a community organization
blocks.body: This page demonstrates how to describe a mission, audience, and local programs without tying the template to a specific real organization.

image.alt: Families sharing food at a picnic
image.caption: Neighborhood picnic
image.description: Illustration of people sharing food and conversation outdoors.

blocks.title: Who we are
blocks.body: We are a sample community group focused on connection, learning, service, and shared local resources. Replace this text with your organization story, board information, and program summary.

cards.title: Connection
cards.body: Create welcoming spaces where neighbors can meet and support each other.

cards.title: Learning
cards.body: Offer practical workshops and cultural programs for all ages.

cards.title: Service
cards.body: Organize volunteer projects that improve shared community spaces.
